edits.new:
import subprocess, glob, os
files = sorted(glob.glob('/app/hf/f_*.png'))
for f in files:
    out = f[:-4]
    if os.path.exists(out+'.txt'): continue
    subprocess.run(['tesseract', f, out, '--psm','6'], stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
print('done', len(files))
